MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Adonis Duffy. David G. Mendez, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Chuck Dahud and Defendant Greg Austin appeared in pro per. The case did not settle and remains on the trial calendar.
